title: The Glass Mod
description: A mod that adds glassium ores, ingots, nuggots, purified glassium, glassium block, the glasstronaught, the Glass BoxShip, The Glass Dimention, The Glass portal and Portal ingighter, tools, wepons, a custom block
body:
-REQUIRES NEOFORGE-
A mod that adds glassium ores, ingots, nuggots, purified glassium, glassium block, the glasstronaught, the Glass BoxShip, The Glass Dimention, The Glass portal and Portal ingighter, tools, wepons, a Custom Glassium Block
